palette_rules.canyang: mud brown, herb green, dusk red edge, smoke grey
palette_rules.qingming: bone white, insect-wax pearl, cold gold pins, black-green chitin
palette_rules.zhaoming: dull gold, moon-white ceramic/jade, cracked lacquer, old paper
palette_rules.north_intro: snow grey, wall blackstone, torn banner shadow, low ember

lens_and_framing: old well geometry first, mystery second
hierarchy_rules: Bai Yi is upper Qingming intelligence/institutional authority; background inspectors are cropped lower-function enforcers.
Zhaoming relics are partial old-object traces, not live royal branding in episode 01.
negative_rules: no readable generated text in asset images
